description: The Ghetto Boys is a street gang based in New Cross, Lewisham and Deptford, South London. Formed in the 1970s on the Woodpecker Estate, it is primarily composed of Black British members. The gang has been involved in drug trafficking, murder, assault, and robbery, and had a notable conflict with the Peckham Boys. By the mid-late 2000s, the gang declined and splintered, with offshoots like Shower and 814 emerging.
